code: import{jsxs as _jsxs,jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";export default function RiskGauge(_ref){let{probability,confidence}=_ref;const pct=(probability*100).toFixed(1);const level=probability<0.3?'green':probability<0.6?'yellow':'red';const status=level==='green'?'Low Risk':level==='yellow'?'Medium Risk':'High Risk';const statusColor=level==='green'?'var(--clr-success-600)':level==='yellow'?'var(--clr-warning-600)':'var(--clr-danger-600)';return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"risk-gauge animate-fadeUp",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:`risk-gauge-circle ${level}`,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"risk-gauge-value",children:[pct,"%"]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"risk-gauge-label",children:"Default Risk"})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"risk-gauge-status",style:{color:statusColor},children:status}),confidence!==undefined&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{style:{marginTop:8,fontSize:13,color:'var(--text-muted)',textAlign:'center'},children:["Agent Confidence: ",/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("span",{style:{fontWeight:700,fontFamily:'var(--font-mono)'},children:[(confidence*100).toFixed(0),"%"]})]})]});}
